title: Develop landscape designs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop landscape designs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a design brief

pcs.text: Consult with client to establish landscape design requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to establish landscape design requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to establish landscape design requirements.

pcs.text: Clarify site constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify site constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify site constraints.

pcs.text: Determine budget parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine budget parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine budget parameters.

pcs.text: Advise client of process to finalise project and anticipated timelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise client of process to finalise project and anticipated timelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise client of process to finalise project and anticipated timelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop a design brief

elements.title: Analyse the site

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks related to site inspection and implement safe working practices to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks related to site inspection and implement safe working practices to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks related to site inspection and implement safe working practices to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Inspect site to identify and record physical elements and features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site to identify and record physical elements and features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site to identify and record physical elements and features.

pcs.text: Identify and record soil conditions, topography, aspect, existing and local endemic vegetation, neighbouring elements, levels and climatic factors that may impact the design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record soil conditions, topography, aspect, existing and local endemic vegetation, neighbouring elements, levels and climatic factors that may impact the design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record soil conditions, topography, aspect, existing and local endemic vegetation, neighbouring elements, levels and climatic factors that may impact the design.

pcs.text: Identify impact of local council, legislative and regulatory requirements on design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify impact of local council, legislative and regulatory requirements on design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify impact of local council, legislative and regulatory requirements on design.

pcs.text: Assess and record additional information that will impact design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record additional information that will impact design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record additional information that will impact design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Analyse the site

elements.title: Develop a design concept

pcs.text: Source information and ideas that may assist in generating design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source information and ideas that may assist in generating design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source information and ideas that may assist in generating design.

pcs.text: Refine design ideas to develop a concept that meets brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refine design ideas to develop a concept that meets brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refine design ideas to develop a concept that meets brief.

pcs.text: Analyse design concept for its aesthetic integrity and effective use of design principles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse design concept for its aesthetic integrity and effective use of design principles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse design concept for its aesthetic integrity and effective use of design principles.

pcs.text: Consult with client to agree any required changes or modifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to agree any required changes or modifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to agree any required changes or modifications.

pcs.text: Confirm design concept with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm design concept with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm design concept with client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop a design concept

elements.title: Incorporate the use of lighting into a design

pcs.text: Determine need for supplementary lighting in landscape

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine need for supplementary lighting in landscape.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify lighting effects to support design.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review use of lighting to ensure it is consistent with design concept and budget.

elements.title: Prepare the final landscape design

pcs.text: Complete design concept to illustrate final location and layout of landscape elements according to design brief

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete design concept to illustrate final location and layout of landscape elements according to design brief.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare planting plan according to landscape design.

pcs.text: Incorporate clear and precise notes on design to assist in interpretation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate clear and precise notes on design to assist in interpretation.

pcs.text: Review final design in consultation with client to ensure all requirements have been addressed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review final design in consultation with client to ensure all requirements have been addressed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review final design in consultation with client to ensure all requirements have been addressed.

pcs.text: Submit completed landscape design to client within agreed timeframes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit completed landscape design to client within agreed timeframes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit completed landscape design to client within agreed timeframes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare the final landscape design
